rationale: At 10 minutes, this 'Year Plan' overview is the clearest introduction to Catalyst Athletics' programming framework and how training is structured across a macrocycle.
title: The Year Plan for Olympic Weightlifting Training Programs

rationale: A 7-minute walkthrough of the weekly training schedule shows new viewers how Greg organizes the snatch, clean & jerk, and supporting lifts in practice.
title: Laying Out The Training Week Schedule for Olympic Weightlifting

rationale: Directly explains Greg's stance on RPE vs percentages, a core piece of his coach-prescribed-loads-before-percentages philosophy.
title: RPE or Percentages for Olympic Weightlifting - Training Intensity

rationale: A foundational program-design explainer on training and recovery for adaptation that frames how the whole system is built.
title: Training & Recovery for Adaptation - Program Design for Olympic Weightlifting

rationale: A standalone, methodology-driven explanation of how Prilepin's Table informs Catalyst's volume/intensity prescriptions for the competition lifts.
title: How to Use Prilepin's Table for Olympic Weightlifting
